scale: x/4 (mean of Performance-signal, Untested-territory, Market-timing — each 1–4)

agreement.metric: share of exemplars where |judge_score - human_score| <= tolerance
agreement.note: promote >= 0.75; 0.65–0.75 = monitor; < 0.65 = noise (do not gate on this prompt version). Krippendorff alpha >= 0.8 is the high-confidence bar but needs repeated/multi-rater runs — out of scope for this single-pass harness; documented as the stricter target.

howToRun: For each exemplar: give marketing-creative-scorer the file BODY (upstream + frames) WITHOUT the frontmatter human_score, have it score per its Stage-09 rubric (reasoning before score), and record {id: judge_score} into this dir's grading.json. Then `node evals/marketing-creative/run.mjs` computes judge-human agreement vs the pinned scores. Pin the scorer prompt version to its agreement result (a prompt version's identity is its eval score).
